title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
